name: Stahlke Bus Svc
registry_source: Minnesota Secretary of State (entity 3Z-816); originally filed as Bernick, Inc., renamed to Stahlke Bus Service, Inc. on 1986-04-30
notes: Address and city match input exactly. Business founded 1948 by Dwain and Ruth Stahlke; formally incorporated 1981. Daughter Julie and husband Mel Bernick purchased in 1982; now operated by Jay Bernick. 27 school buses (16+ pax), 6 buses, 5 vans. MN passenger authorization, authorized for hire, not authorized for interstate property hauling.

name: Candlewood Valley Bus Co
registry_source: Not located in CT SOTS public records via available web searches; OpenCorporates blocked by CAPTCHA
notes: No active SAFER/FMCSA record found under 'Candlewood Valley Bus' or 'Candlewood Valley'; SAFER keyword search returned zero records. Historical Candlewood Valley Bus Company operated transit under contract for Danbury-Bethel Transit District beginning 1973; HART (now HARTransit) took full control of operations from Candlewood Valley Bus Company in 1991, suggesting the entity may be defunct or dormant. The address 180 Old Brookfield Rd, Danbury appears currently occupied by D&D Power and Pleasure (motorsports). A different unrelated carrier, CANDLEWOOD VALLEY MOTORS LLC (USDOT 2013430, New Milford CT, property hauler, 5 power units) exists but is NOT a school bus operator and address does not match. Status of Candlewood Valley Bus Co as a current school bus operator is unverified.

name: Brik Transportation Acad LLC
registry_source: Not located via LA Secretary of State CORA web search; SOS CommercialSearch portal not directly fetchable
notes: No SAFER record matching 'BRIK TRANSPORTATION', 'BRIK TRANSPORTATION ACAD', or 'BRIK' found in FMCSA SAFER keyword search. No web presence located for the LLC at 244 Deerfield Blvd, Minden, LA 71055. Possible carrier mis-spelling - alternative spellings like 'BRICK' yielded unrelated NJ-based companies (BRICK BOY TRANSPORTATION, BRICKS TRANSPORTATION INC). Bryce Transport Inc (USDOT 583605) operates in Minden but is unrelated freight carrier. Recommend direct lookup on Louisiana SOS coraweb.sos.la.gov and/or LPSC carrier registry to verify entity existence.

name: Linder Bus Co
carrier_operation: Intrastate Non-Hazmat (Exempt for Hire, MN Passenger)
fmcsa_address: 1045 5th Avenue South, Hutchinson, MN 55350 (mailing: 435 Franklin Street SW, Hutchinson, MN 55350)
registry_source: MN SOS direct entity lookup not retrieved; operating history confirmed via Hutchinson Leader / crowrivermedia.com news coverage
notes: USDOT 844219 is INACTIVE per SAFER. Address matches input street/city. Linder Bus Co served Hutchinson ISD 423 for 62 years (founded ~1951). Owner Rick Linder retired and liquidated end of June 2013; sold to Vision Transportation in 2013. In 2017 Hicks Bus Line purchased the Hutchinson branch of Vision Transportation and renamed it Hutchinson Bus Line (USDOT 2994609). Fleet at peak: 34 large school buses (16+ pax), 2 small school buses (1-8 pax). Company added to FMCSA records 1999-12-14. Most recent annual mileage 470,000 miles (2010).

name: Basma School Transport Inc
entity_status: Active (NJ Domestic Profit Corporation, per registry; no recent dissolution noted)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue - Business Records (NJ Entity ID 0400009320), corroborated by city-data.com mirror
notes: No SAFER match for 'BASMA SCHOOL TRANSPORT' or 'BASMA SCHOOL' - SAFER keyword search returned zero records. Only carrier under 'BASMA' is in Glen Allen, VA (USDOT 3705142), unrelated. Input address is PO Box 285, Bloomfield, NJ 07003; principal/operational address from third-party directories is 161 N Arlington Ave #21, East Orange, NJ 07017 (phone 973-393-1836). NJ corporate entity registered as Domestic Profit Corporation on 2002-04-10. Carrier may operate under different DBA in FMCSA records, may not require USDOT (if strictly intrastate/under-threshold), or USDOT records may not be findable by company name. NJ school bus contractors are typically required to register with NJDOE; not yet verified in NJ school bus contractor list.
